# VIBE DESIGN Project Instructions

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Project Overview
VIBE DESIGN is a high-end animation gallery built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.

## Implemented Animations
- [x] Gradient Effects (ID 18)
- [x] Loading Animations (ID 25)
- [x] Expressive Typography (ID 4)
- [x] Hover Effects (ID 26)
- [x] Microinteractions (ID 12)
- [x] Neumorphic Effects (ID 27)

## Development
- Run `npm run dev` to start the development server.
- Edit `src/data/animations.ts` to add or modify animation entries.
- Components are located in `src/components`.
